pi_items.source: Verified in task description, verifier.py (line 76), and task goal. This is the final event name after successful rename. Setup creates initial events as 'Hold: Q3 Budget Review' and verifier checks that the Wednesday event is renamed to exactly 'Q3 Budget Review'.

Verified in setup_task.sh (line 58 shows the default event name parameter as 'Hold: Q3 Budget Review'). Export script checks for remaining events with this pattern using search_count on 'ilike' (export_result.sh line 80). Verifier penalizes any events still containing 'Hold' in the name (verifier.py line 79-80).

privileged_info_summary: The task creates synthetic Odoo calendar events with the initial name 'Hold: Q3 Budget Review' on three consecutive days (Tuesday 10:00, Wednesday 14:00/2:00 PM, Thursday 11:00). The agent must delete the Tuesday and Thursday events, and rename the Wednesday event to 'Q3 Budget Review' while preserving its 2:00 PM time slot. Success requires the final Wednesday event to have the exact name 'Q3 Budget Review' without the 'Hold: ' prefix, and no remaining events matching the discard pattern.
